style.image_style: Korean mystery webtoon video-toon, layered background and character cutout, restrained cinematic shadows, expressive face, crisp line art

forced_style.force_positive: premium Korean mystery webtoon, reusable layered background, separate character foreground layer, clean cel shading, restrained noir lighting, expressive eyes, readable acting pose
forced_style.force_negative: photorealistic, 3d render, gore, horror monster, jump scare, chibi, super deformed, cropped head, cut off hair, messy overlays, floating UI card, bank slip, fake phone screen, watermark, logo, nsfw

thumbnail.style_guide: 공포 괴물보다 생활형 미스터리. 소품 하나와 인물 표정으로 궁금증을 만든다. 제목은 구체적 장소/시간/반복 행동을 포함한다.

sd.positive: masterpiece, best quality, premium Korean mystery webtoon video-toon, layered background, character foreground, clean cel shading, expressive face, restrained shadows
sd.negative: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), photorealistic, 3d render, gore, monster, chibi, cropped head, cut off hair, deformed face, extra fingers, watermark, text, UI overlay, nsfw
